paths.title: First Production Deploy
paths.description: The critical foundation a solo founder needs before real traffic hits: secure identity, safe secrets, a tested deployment pipeline, and basic visibility into what is happening in production.
paths.audience: Solo founder shipping their first real product

paths.title: First Real Users
paths.description: Handle real money, real identity, and real data correctly when paying customers arrive: add payments, lock down access, enforce data rules, and build enough observability to know when things break.
paths.audience: Early-stage team handling money, identity, and data integrity

paths.title: Ops Maturity
paths.description: Build the incident-response muscle and on-call discipline a growing team needs to detect problems faster, resolve them consistently, and learn from every outage without burning people out.
paths.audience: Growing team building incident response and on-call discipline

paths.title: Going Multi-Region
paths.description: Extend a production system across geographic regions to reduce latency for global users and survive regional cloud outages, covering the data, networking, and operational prerequisites.
paths.audience: Scaling product with latency or data residency requirements

paths.title: First SRE Hire
paths.description: A structured onboarding curriculum for a new platform or site-reliability engineer covering the reliability, delivery, and incident-management layers they will own from day one.
paths.audience: Incoming platform engineer or first SRE hire

paths.title: Subscription Business Foundations
paths.description: Everything a product team needs to model a subscription correctly: payment processing, state machines, churn prevention, and the compliance obligations that come with storing financial data.
paths.audience: SaaS team launching or hardening a subscription product

paths.title: Async & Reliability Patterns
paths.description: Design asynchronous processing pipelines that survive failures gracefully: queue work correctly, handle poison messages, cache at the right layer, and scale horizontally without rewriting.
paths.audience: Backend engineer building reliable async and queue-based systems
